column1: # mzpeak-example-data — vendor-raw dataset manifest (drives build_data.sh `vendor` mode).
# The mzML / imzML / sdrf tiles are reconstructed by scripts/fetch-*.sh (curated URLs); this
# manifest covers the VENDOR-RAW tiles. Columns are TAB-separated:
#   tile          data/<tile> subdir lives under here (may be "tile/sub")
#   dir           dataset directory under the tile
#   files         ';'-separated DIRECT download URLs, or '-' = no stable direct URL (build_data.sh
#                 prints the dataset page to fetch manually into data/<tile>/<dir>/)
#   unpack        zip | none      (zip = unzip every *.zip in place after download)
#   convert_input path under data/<tile>/<dir>/ to convert, or 'auto' = autodetect the *.d/*.raw/*.wiff
#                 unit in the dir (use for zipped/manual units whose inner name isn't known up front)
# Direct URLs verified against the PRIDE/MetaboLights file APIs (2026-06).

column9: Bruker BAF .d folder (multi-file); native reader needs baf2sql_c + TIMSDATA_LIB_DIR
Bruker timsTOF Pro PASEF (.d TDF, pure-Rust reader)
